subject: realtime_present
run_command: cargo build -p uc03-demo --features d3d12-present;(real)cargo run -p uc03-demo --features d3d12-present-real -- --present

device.result_line: G0 sr_tonemap 写共享 buffer→fence 同步→窗口 Present + 数值回读通过

facts.name: frame_typestate_compiles
facts.note: Ready→Acquired→Presentable 消费式 typestate + 偶/奇 fence handoff 编译期保证 present 同步序(RXS-0142);交互 runner 连续 Present 8 帧且数值回读为 RGB 255/128/0

redgreen.red_command: 删 present 通路 signal/wait 同步 / 篡改帧像素
